Condition: Latest successful Dropbox backup started after the latest finished ops.prune_daily attempt
Verification source: daily_task_health table
What runs: Continue
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: None
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: Ensures the Dropbox backup contains everything written by Prune Daily.

Condition: Latest successful Dropbox backup did not start after the latest finished ops.prune_daily attempt
Verification source: daily_task_health table
What runs: Refuse to run Integrity
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: None
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: A failed or partial Prune Daily attempt may still have changed R2.

Condition: Latest successful Dropbox backup started after the latest finished ops.r2_core_snapshot attempt
Verification source: daily_task_health table
What runs: Continue
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: None
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: Ensures the local v2 core snapshot matches the latest completed core writer attempt.

Condition: Latest successful Dropbox backup did not start after the latest finished ops.r2_core_snapshot attempt
Verification source: daily_task_health table
What runs: Refuse to run Integrity
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: None
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: Prevents Integrity using an older v2 core snapshot.

Condition: A previous repair-mode ops.history_integrity attempt exists
Verification source: daily_task_health table and repair_mode flag/summary
What runs: Require the latest successful Dropbox backup to have started after that repair attempt finished
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: None
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: This is simple insurance. With one run per day, the next scheduled backup should normally satisfy it.

Condition: Any relevant writer task is still running or has no finished time
Verification source: daily_task_health table
What runs: Refuse to run Integrity
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: None
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: Avoids starting while R2 may still be changing.

Scope: Per day, connector, pollutant and timeseries
Condition: Source-cache and Dropbox observs agree
Verification source: source-cache compared with R2_history_backup/history/v2/observations
What runs: Mark observs correct
Local overlay action: No overlay file
Cloudflare R2 action: No write
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: Healthy observs are not rewritten.

Scope: Per day, connector, pollutant and affected timeseries
Condition: Source-cache and Dropbox observs do not agree
Verification source: source-cache compared with R2_history_backup/history/v2/observations
What runs: Rebuild the affected v2 observ parquet
Local overlay action: Write repaired parquet into sparse run overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload repaired parquet to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back from R2 and verify, then mark overlay copy verified
Why this order: All later stages use the final repaired observs from the overlay.

Condition: Source data or mapping is unavailable
Verification source: source-cache status and history/v2/core mappings
What runs: Do not repair; mark operator action
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: No write
Post-write verification: None
Why this order: Prevents metadata and AQI being built from uncertain observs.

Condition: Scope is in OBSERVS_CHANGED
Verification source: Combined local view: verified overlay first, Dropbox backup second
What runs: Rebuild affected manifests bottom-up
Local overlay action: Write each rebuilt manifest into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload each changed manifest to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify each changed manifest before using it as a parent child
Why this order: Manifests are built once from the final observs state.

Condition: Scope is not in OBSERVS_CHANGED
Verification source: Dropbox observ parquet and Dropbox observation manifests
What runs: Verify existing manifests; rebuild only faults found
Local overlay action: Put any repaired manifest into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload repaired manifests to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify repaired manifests
Why this order: Unchanged scopes are checked without unnecessary writes.

Condition: Observation manifests changed
Verification source: Combined local view: verified overlay first, Dropbox backup second
What runs: Rebuild observation index/latest/metadata from final day manifests
Local overlay action: Write rebuilt index objects into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload changed index objects to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify each changed object
Why this order: Indexes must follow manifests, otherwise they may need rebuilding twice.

Condition: Observation manifests did not change
Verification source: Dropbox observation day manifests compared with Dropbox observation indexes
What runs: Verify existing indexes; rebuild only faults found
Local overlay action: Put any repaired index object into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload repaired index objects to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify repaired objects
Why this order: Checks the rest of the requested range without rebuilding healthy indexes.

Scope: AQI-eligible pollutant, per day, connector and timeseries/hour
Condition: Observs changed earlier in this run
Verification source: Expected hours from final observs in overlay/Dropbox combined view; actual aqilevels from overlay first, Dropbox second
What runs: Verify expected UTC hours; rebuild missing or invalid aqilevels
Local overlay action: Write rebuilt aqilevel parquet into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload rebuilt aqilevel parquet to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify expected UTC-hour identities
Why this order: AQI uses final repaired observs, so it runs after observ metadata is complete.

Condition: Observs did not change earlier in this run
Verification source: Expected hours from Dropbox observs; actual aqilevels from Dropbox
What runs: Verify existing aqilevels; rebuild only faults found
Local overlay action: Put rebuilt aqilevel parquet into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload rebuilt aqilevel parquet to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify expected UTC-hour identities
Why this order: Avoids rebuilding healthy AQI data.

Condition: Pollutant is not AQI eligible
Verification source: history/v2/core observed-property mapping
What runs: Skip AQI-level verification and repair for this pollutant
Local overlay action: None
Cloudflare R2 action: No write
Post-write verification: None
Next stage: AQI Levels manifests for eligible scopes only
Why this order: Unsupported pollutants never enter the AQI workflow.

Condition: Scope is in AQILEVELS_CHANGED
Verification source: Combined local view: verified overlay first, Dropbox backup second
What runs: Rebuild AQI manifests bottom-up
Local overlay action: Write rebuilt AQI manifests into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload changed AQI manifests to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify each changed manifest
Why this order: AQI manifests are built once from final AQI parquet.

Condition: Scope is not in AQILEVELS_CHANGED
Verification source: Dropbox aqilevel parquet and Dropbox AQI manifests
What runs: Verify existing AQI manifests; rebuild only faults found
Local overlay action: Put any repaired AQI manifest into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload repaired AQI manifests to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify repaired manifests
Why this order: Unchanged scopes are checked without unnecessary rebuilds.

Condition: AQI manifests changed
Verification source: Combined local view: verified overlay first, Dropbox backup second
What runs: Rebuild AQI index/latest/metadata from final AQI day manifests
Local overlay action: Write rebuilt AQI index objects into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload changed AQI index objects to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify each changed object
Why this order: Indexes follow the final AQI manifest hierarchy.

Condition: AQI manifests did not change
Verification source: Dropbox AQI day manifests compared with Dropbox AQI indexes
What runs: Verify existing AQI indexes; rebuild only faults found
Local overlay action: Put any repaired index object into overlay
Cloudflare R2 action: Upload repaired AQI index objects to R2 History
Post-write verification: GET/read back and verify repaired objects
Why this order: Checks the requested range without unnecessary index writes.

Condition: One or more objects changed during this run
Verification source: source-cache for observ truth; verified overlay for generated objects; targeted live R2 GETs for objects written
What runs: Verify the complete six-stage result once
Local overlay action: Keep overlay and run-state as evidence until the run ends
Cloudflare R2 action: No additional writes unless a separately diagnosed defect is fixed
Post-write verification: Confirm every written object matches the verified overlay copy
Why this order: One final pass avoids repeated repair loops.
